mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart (user_id, product_id, product_quantity, product_price, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, 1, #{productPrice}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE cart SET product_quantity = #{productQuantity} , last_modified_time = #{lastModifiedTime}, last_modified_user_name = #{lastModifiedUserName} WHERE user_id = #{userId} and product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cart WHERE user_id = #{userId} and product_id = #{productId}
